# QA Plan: Sprint 7 (Bug Triage + Tech Debt Burn-Down)
**Date**: 2026-05-09
**Generated by**: /qa-plan
**Scope**: 17 stories — 11 must-have / 4 should-have / 2 nice-to-have
**Engine**: Roblox (Luau, --!strict)
**Sprint File**: `production/sprints/sprint-7.md`
**Sprint window**: 2026-05-23 → 2026-06-05

> Sprint 6 retrospective lesson informing this plan: every Sprint 6 component
> was unit-tested but the full server-to-client integration was never auto-validated.
> BUG-001 (S1) surfaced only in Studio playtest. Sprint 7 must close this gap via
> 7-4 E2E integration smoke and per-story manual test cases that exercise the
> live wiring, not just the isolated module.

---

## Automated Tests Required

### 7-1 BUG-001 fix — visual absorb loop server-side updateCount [Integration + Visual/Feel]

**Test file path**: `tests/integration/absorb-system/visual_absorb_loop_e2e.spec.luau`

**What to test**:
- After `RoundLifecycle.createAll(participants)` and `NPCSpawner.createAll(participants)` both fire, AbsorbSystem.tick observes non-empty `csm.getAllActive()` AND non-empty `npcSpawner.getAllActiveNPCs()` (closes silent no-op path identified in BUG-001 cause #1, #4)
- Synthetic NPC positioned within `crowd.radius` of player crowd → AbsorbSystem.tick fires `csm.updateCount(crowdId, 1, "Absorb")` exactly once
- Synthetic NPC positioned just outside `crowd.radius` (radius + 0.1 studs) → updateCount NOT fired (negative case)
- After updateCount, broadcast payload published this tick contains updated count for that crowdId
- Mock client subscribed to broadcast receives count delta and would call `setPoolSize(newCount)` (verify via spy)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Zero NPCs in spawner pool — AbsorbSystem.tick early-returns silently; no errors logged
- Zero player crowds in CSM — same silent early-return
- Two NPCs same tick at same player crowd — both produce updateCount calls (or one, per F2 contention rule — verify spec)
- Player crowd at GraceWindow state — AbsorbSystem.tick reads it, updateCount still fires (Story 5-13 AC-8)
- Player crowd at Eliminated state — skipped per Story 5-13 AC-7

**Estimated test count**: 8 it() blocks

*Bug-fix specific*: this story EXISTS to land the integration that BUG-001 found broken. The test is the proof of fix.

---

### 7-2 AbsorbSystem diagnostic logging [Logic]

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/absorb-system/diagnostic_logging.spec.luau`

**What to test**:
- When config flag `DIAGNOSTIC_LOGGING_ENABLED = true` and tickCount % 15 == 0 and Active state: log line `[AbsorbSystem] tick N crowds=M npcs=K` is emitted exactly once
- When tickCount % 15 != 0: no log emitted that tick
- When config flag = false (production default): no log emitted at any tickCount
- Log values match `#csm.getAllActive()` and `#npcSpawner.getAllActiveNPCs()` at call time

**Edge cases to cover**:
- tickCount = 0 — first tick of round, log fires (15 mod 15 = 0)
- Crowds = 0 → log line still emits with `crowds=0`
- 30 ticks in 2 sec — exactly 2 log lines (tick 0 and tick 15)

**Estimated test count**: 4 it() blocks

---

### 7-3 BUG-002 follower clump [Visual/Feel]

**No automated test** — root cause is CFrame composition path (LOD render), not unit-testable headless. See manual checklist below.

If Phase 1 investigation finds the bug is in `Pool.computeSpawnPositions` returning all-zero offsets (cause #2 in BUG-002 doc), then add unit test:
- `tests/unit/follower-entity/pool_spawn_scatter.spec.luau` — `computeSpawnPositions(count=10)` returns 10 distinct positions, each ≥ SEPARATION_RADIUS apart from at least one other.

If root cause is CFrame source (cause #1 — `bundle.body.CFrame` reads `_spawnOffsets` instead of `_positions`), no automated coverage possible without integration harness. Document in test-plan deviation note.

---

### 7-4 E2E integration smoke — synthetic absorb → broadcast count delta [Integration]

**Test file path**: `tests/integration/e2e-smoke/absorb_to_broadcast.spec.luau`

**What to test**:
- Boot full TickOrchestrator with all 9 phases registered
- Initialize CSM with 1 player crowd (mock owner resolver)
- Initialize NPCSpawner with 1 NPC at player crowd's position
- Run 30 ticks (2s at 15 Hz)
- Assert: AbsorbSystem fired updateCount at least once during the run
- Assert: CSM Phase 8 broadcast emitted updated count payload
- Assert: Mock client subscriber received broadcast and would call setPoolSize with new count
- Assert: NPCSpawner reclaimed the absorbed NPC (active set count decremented)

**Edge cases to cover** (deferred to Sprint 8 if time-pressed; Sprint 7 ships happy-path only):
- Multi-crowd: 2 player crowds + 4 NPCs → each crowd absorbs nearest NPC under F2 contention
- NPC moves out of range mid-tick → no absorb that tick
- Player crowd Eliminated mid-run → broadcast halts for that crowd

**Estimated test count**: 4 it() blocks (single happy path + 3 sanity checks)

*This test is the GATE preventing BUG-001 class regression.* If it ships only happy-path, document the gap explicitly so Sprint 8 picks up the multi-crowd cases.

---

### 7-5 11 follower-entity integration failures [Integration]

**Test file paths** (existing, must restore PASS):
- `tests/integration/follower-entity/crowd_manager_orchestrator.spec.luau` (3 failures — lines 345, 428, 476)
- `tests/integration/follower-entity/wire_in_end_to_end.spec.luau` (4 failures — lines 108, 138, 340, 397)
- `tests/integration/follower-entity/wire_in_pool_integration.spec.luau` (4 failures — lines 117, 135, 161, 258)

**What to test**:
- Run existing assertion blocks; each was capturing a real interaction defect from Sprint 4 design churn
- Failure messages from re-smoke 2026-05-09:
  - `Expected "5" got "9"` — count mismatch
  - `Expected "Despawning" got "Spawning:FadeIn"` — state machine path wrong
  - `Expected "Active" got "Spawning:FadeIn"` — state never advanced
  - `Expected "10" got "12"` — pool size off
  - `Expected "1" got "4"` × 2 — magnitude error
  - `Expected "3" got "7"` / `"3" got "8"` — count mismatch
  - `Expected "12" got "13"` — off-by-one
  - `Expected "7" got "4"` — shrink path wrong
  - `Expected "5" got "8"` — count mismatch

**Acceptance for ceiling story** (alternative if 5h budget exhausts):
- Document at `docs/tech-debt/follower-entity-integration-failures.md` with: per-test failure summary, root-cause hypothesis, defer rationale, milestone for re-take
- All 11 tests `it.skip()` with comment referencing the tech-debt doc

**Estimated effort**: 5h; if not converging by 4h, switch to ceiling story.

### 7-9 Absorb story-006 V/A consumers [Visual/Feel]

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/absorb-system/v_a_consumers.spec.luau`

**What to test**:
- VFX AbsorbSnap event dispatched on each updateCount with hue + position payload
- Audio batching: N absorbs in same frame → 1 audio cue (per ADR-0003 audio category cap)
- Per-frame cap: ABSORB_PER_FRAME_CAP = 6 enforced (Sprint 6 fix landed already)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- 7 absorbs in single frame → 6 VFX dispatched + 1 dropped (cap behavior)
- Zero absorbs in frame → no VFX, no audio
- Two players absorb same tick → distinct VFX events with correct hues

**Estimated test count**: 5 it() blocks

---

### 7-10 MSM story-007 Participation broadcast + AFK 4-Check [Integration]

**Test file path**: `tests/integration/match-state-server/participation_broadcast_afk_check.spec.luau`

**What to test**:
- ParticipationChanged broadcast fires on `_setParticipation(player, true|false)` (per AC)
- AFKToggle remote: 4-Check guard rejects (a) non-player call, (b) call during Snap freeze, (c) call when state ≠ Lobby/Countdown:Ready, (d) call exceeding rate limit
- Selene Condition 2 from Sprint 5 close-out resolved (verify selene clean)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- AFKToggle FALSE→TRUE during Snap → REJECTED
- AFKToggle TRUE→FALSE outside Snap → ACCEPTED + broadcast fires
- 10 rapid AFKToggle calls → only first N within rate limit pass

**Estimated test count**: 8 it() blocks

---

### 7-11 RL story-003 Eliminated subscription + DC freeze [Integration]

**Test file path**: `tests/integration/round-lifecycle/eliminated_subscription_dc_freeze.spec.luau`

**What to test**:
- RL subscribes to CSM CrowdEliminated signal; on fire, sets `_crowds[crowdId].eliminationTime = os.clock()` + `survived = false`
- Mid-Active disconnect: PlayerRemoving handler freezes that crowd's broadcast (no further position/count updates)
- T8 instant-win detection: 1 DC + 1 active crowd remaining → MSM transitions to Result with rivalDisconnected meta

**Edge cases to cover**:
- DC during Lobby → no freeze (no crowd yet)
- DC during Result → no double-fire on already-Eliminated crowd
- Two simultaneous DCs (both active) → both crowds frozen; T5 path triggers (zero-participants Result)

**Estimated test count**: 7 it() blocks

---

### 7-12 Absorb story-007 Perf soak [Logic + perf]

**Test file path**: `tests/perf/absorb-system/overlap_3600_p99.spec.luau`

**What to test**:
- 3600 synthetic overlap events processed
- Per-tick wall-clock timing recorded
- Assert: p99 ≤ 1.5ms per tick (ADR-0003 §Tick Budget §AbsorbSystem)

**Evidence doc**: `production/qa/evidence/absorb-perf-soak-2026-05-XX.md` with timing histogram + p50/p95/p99 numbers.

**Estimated test count**: 1 it() block (single soak run + assertion)

---

### 7-13 TickOrch story-005 per-phase instrumentation [Logic]

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/tick-orchestrator/per_phase_instrumentation.spec.luau`

**What to test**:
- When instrumentation enabled, each phase callback wrapped with `os.clock()` sample → recorded per phase
- Recorded samples accessible via debug API (e.g. `TickOrchestrator._getPhaseTimings()`)
- When instrumentation disabled (production default), wrapper overhead < 0.05ms per phase per tick

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Phase that errors → timing still recorded; record marked errored
- Tick 0 (cold start) → recorded; baseline captured

**Estimated test count**: 5 it() blocks

- DI scaffold accepts mock csm + mock playerData; rejects nil

## Manual QA Checklist

### 7-1 BUG-001 fix — Studio Local Server playtest [Visual/Feel side]

**Verification method**: Studio Local Server (2 clients) + TC-S1-03 from Sprint 6 test cases
**Who must sign off**: tuanhv3 (sole developer)
**Evidence to capture**: Server console screenshot showing `[CSM] updateCount` log; Client viewport screenshot of follower bundle pre/post absorb

Checklist:
- [ ] Walk Client 1 character into NPC → `[CSM] updateCount` log fires within 0.2s
- [ ] Absorbed NPC visually despawns (NPCSpawner reclaim)
- [ ] +1 follower fades in around player character
- [ ] Repeat for second NPC → cumulative +2 followers
- [ ] No Luau errors in Server console during 5-absorb burst

---

### 7-3 BUG-002 follower clump

**Verification method**: Studio Local Server playtest + TC-S1-04 from Sprint 6 test cases
**Who must sign off**: tuanhv3
**Evidence to capture**: Client 1 viewport screenshot showing 10-follower spread

Checklist:
- [ ] At standstill with 10 followers: bundle visibly spread (not a single ball)
- [ ] Min 2 distinct followers visible at distance ≥ SEPARATION_RADIUS (2.5 studs)
- [ ] During player movement: followers arc/trail in swarm pattern
- [ ] On 90° turn: followers smoothly arc, no snap/teleport
- [ ] LOD 0 (close camera) and LOD 1 (mid-distance) both show spread (or LOD 1 documented as known visual gap)

---

### 7-10 MSM AFK toggle

**Verification method**: Studio Local Server + manual AFKToggle remote fire
**Who must sign off**: tuanhv3
**Evidence**: Server console screenshot showing 4-Check rejection + acceptance paths

Checklist:
- [ ] AFK Toggle in Lobby: ACCEPTED, broadcast fires
- [ ] AFK Toggle during Snap freeze (TRUE→FALSE): REJECTED silently
- [ ] AFK Toggle during Active: REJECTED (state guard)
- [ ] Rapid 10 calls in 1s: most rejected by rate limit

---

### 7-11 RL Eliminated + DC freeze

**Verification method**: Studio Local Server with 2 clients
**Who must sign off**: tuanhv3
**Evidence**: Console + viewport screenshots

Checklist:
- [ ] Mid-Active: kill Client 1 crowd (CSM updateCount → 0) → CrowdEliminated signal fires
- [ ] Client 2 crowd unaffected
- [ ] DC Client 1 mid-Active → server console shows freeze handler fired; Client 1's crowd no longer broadcasting
- [ ] DC reduces active crowds to 1 → MSM T8 instant-win to Result

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before Sprint 7 QA hand-off:

1. Game launches to main menu without crash
2. 2 clients connect → MSM Lobby → Countdown → Active sequence fires (Sprint 6 baseline)
3. **NEW (Sprint 7 P1)**: Player walks into NPC → `[CSM] updateCount` log fires + visible follower added (BUG-001 fix verification)
4. **NEW (Sprint 7)**: 10 followers visibly spread, not clumped (BUG-002 fix verification)
5. CCR Phase 1 runs without Luau warns during crowd overlap (Sprint 6 carry)
6. NPC idle-walk visible on spawned NPCs (Sprint 6 carry)
7. CSM F2 position lag — follower bundle smoothly trails player HRP (Sprint 6 carry)
8. Save/load — N/A (not yet implemented in Crowdsmith)
9. No new frame spikes during 5-absorb burst (Microprofiler peak ≤ 33ms)

Run `/smoke-check sprint` against this list at Sprint 7 close.

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|-------|--------------|--------------|-------------------|
| 7-1 + 7-3 | Confirm visual absorb loop + boid spread feel correct end-to-end | 1 (~1.5h) | tuanhv3 (sole dev — all sessions are self-playtests) |
| 7-9 | V/A consumers — does absorb feel impactful? | 1 (~30min) | tuanhv3 |
| 7-10 / 7-11 | AFK + DC scenarios feel correct | 1 (~30min combined) | tuanhv3 |

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes written to `production/session-logs/playtest-sprint-7-[story-slug].md` and committed before story marked Complete via `/story-done`.

---

## Definition of Done — Sprint 7

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — automated test PASS OR documented manual evidence
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for all Visual/Feel stories
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off)
- [ ] No regressions introduced (re-smoke against Sprint 6 baseline of 891 PASS)
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/code-review` or self-review for solo dev)
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)
- [ ] **Sprint-level**: BUG-001 + BUG-002 closed; sprint goal MET; QA sign-off APPROVED (no conditions)

---

## Notes

- 7-1 is the sprint's keystone. Until it lands, 7-9 (Absorb V/A) and 7-12 (Absorb perf soak) cannot validate end-to-end.
- 7-4 E2E integration smoke is the structural fix preventing BUG-001 class recurrence — every component will be unit-tested AND the full chain will have a headless gate. Treat this with same priority as 7-1.
- 7-5 ceiling-story option is acceptable for 11 follower-entity failures — third consecutive carry-forward, sprint cannot stretch indefinitely. Document defer rationale clearly.
- Sprint 6 retrospective (7-15) should explicitly call out the test-strategy gap surfaced by BUG-001 — this QA plan attempts to close that gap by requiring per-story manual TCs that exercise live wiring.
